title: Wake Up Call
summary: Nova wakes for another shift in the Pit and reports to Jed before the colony day starts.
description: Learn the basics of moving through the Homestead, get your bearings, find Jed, and get your gear ready for another quota run.
flavor: For Nova, survival starts before breakfast.

stages.title: Wake in the Pit
stages.description: Get your bearings in Nova's bunk and leave the sleeping level.

tasks.text: Turn on the bunk light.
Find your way out of the Pit sleeping level.

stages.title: Report to Jed
stages.description: Find Jed in the Pit, then follow his directions to the Workshop.

tasks.text: Find Jed in his bunk.
Talk to Jed about the shift.
Reach Jed's Workshop.
Receive your starter gear from Jed.
Use Jed's workbench to craft the Functional Cryo-Inductor.

title: Shift Clearance
summary: Nova has to clear the Transit Checkpoint before Dominion's paperwork turns her into a liability.
description: Report for shift clearance at the Transit Checkpoint, get a mine badge, and survive the Dominion math that marked Nova for recycling.
flavor: The system does not hate you. It calculated you.

stages.title: Report for Shift Clearance
stages.description: Jed repaired Nova's cutter, but Dominion still makes every worker clear the Transit Checkpoint before entering the mine.

tasks.text: Report to the Transit Checkpoint for mine shift clearance.
Let the scanner reject Nova so Zeke can reach the file.

stages.title: Override the Flag
stages.description: Zeke finds Nova's mandatory retirement order and tries to bury it in the paperwork.

tasks.text: Talk to Zeke at the Admin window.
Choose the paperwork category Zeke can use to bury the liability flag.
Take the temporary Mine Access Badge before the system notices the override.

title: The Echo
summary: Zeke's temporary override sends Nova to Logistics review, where Boggs turns her clearance into Sector 4 punishment duty.
description: Report to Logistics, survive Boggs' required shield training, descend into the Deep Mine, and find the source of the impossible hum.
flavor: The mine was never quiet. Nova just had not heard what was underneath.

stages.title: Logistics Review
stages.description: Zeke kept Nova alive, but the override routes her through Foreman Boggs before she can work the mine.

tasks.text: Cross into Logistics before the temporary override expires.
Report to Foreman Boggs and survive the work assignment he finds in Nova's file.
Use the Mine Access Badge and Boggs' authorization at the Deep Elevator.

stages.title: Deep Mine Descent
stages.description: Restore the mine lights, push through the old tunnels, and feel the signal become stranger than a broken relay.

tasks.text: Restore power at the Cavern Junction support pillar.
Survive the first thing stirred up by the interference.
Defeat a shielded Acoustic Bulwark by using Guard Break or Stagger.
Follow the hum to the Architect threshold below Sector 4.

stages.title: The Tuning Fork
stages.description: The interference is a relic signal, and touching it changes Nova loudly enough for the colony to notice.

tasks.text: Step through the threshold into the impossible chamber.
Touch the Tuning Fork at the center of the signal.
Survive the Source sync and recover the relic.

title: Red Alert
summary: The relic trips the lockdown and the colony Nova knew turns hostile.
description: Escape the Deep Mine under lockdown, follow Zeke's comm guidance, and reach the Cargo Lift before the Warden turns Nova's anomaly into an execution order.
flavor: The system stopped ignoring Nova. That was worse.

stages.title: Escape the Lockdown
stages.description: The Warden seals the sector after Nova syncs with the relic.

tasks.text: Survive the broadcast that names Nova as a containment threat.
Follow Zeke's stolen comm route while the sector seals itself behind Nova.
Fight through the security teams collapsing on the escape route.

stages.title: Cargo Lift
stages.description: Jed catches up at the lift with one last piece of impossible scrap and makes Nova's escape bigger than quota.

tasks.text: Reach the Cargo Lift.
Take Jed's Chime and the cost of using it.
Run for the Launch Bay before Jed's opening closes.

title: The Launch
summary: Nova and Zeke hijack a cargo pod, but the sky is another Dominion lock.
description: Fight to the Pod Bay, defeat the Warden, splice the Chime into the pod core, and launch into the crash that ends Nova's old life.
flavor: Escaping the colony is not the same thing as escaping the planet.

stages.title: Reach the Pod Bay
stages.description: Security is collapsing toward the launch rail, and the pod bay is the only direction left that is not a cell.

tasks.text: Fight through Launch Bay access before security reboots the route.
Reach the Pod Bay while Zeke keeps the hatch controls confused.

stages.title: Defeat the Warden
stages.description: The Warden blocks the pod and forces Nova to prove what she learned in the mines.

tasks.text: Survive the Warden's arrival.
Break the Warden's guard.
Defeat the Warden.

stages.title: Launch
stages.description: The Chime wakes the pod core, but the sky itself answers with another lock.

tasks.text: Splice the Chime into the pod core.
Launch from the colony.
Hit the Planetary Shield and crash toward Sector 9.

title: The Scavenger's Stash
summary: Scrapper knows where a failed rebel cache is hidden, but paranoia keeps him from fetching it.
description: Follow Scrapper's lead through Trade Row, find the old cache, and recover the explosives the last resistance cell never got to use.
flavor: The people who hid the stash are gone. Their warning still has teeth.

stages.title: Follow Scrapper's Tip
stages.description: Scrapper has a lead on a hidden cache from a failed rebel operation.

tasks.text: Talk to Scrapper in Trade Row.
Find the hidden stash.
Open the old rebel cache.

stages.title: Return to Scrapper
stages.description: Bring the cache proof back before Scrapper loses his nerve.

tasks.text: Return to Scrapper.

title: System Flush
summary: Doc's med-bay vents are backing up with toxic fumes because Dominion keeps denying repairs.
description: Clear the contaminated ventilation route, stop the fumes from poisoning the med-bay, and collect Doc's corrosive round mod.
flavor: Dominion does not fix what it can replace.

stages.title: Clear the Vents
stages.description: Doc needs the med-bay vents cleared before more patients start coughing blood.

tasks.text: Talk to Doc in the Med-Bay.
Enter the ventilation hub.
Inspect the cracked vent.
Reroute the failing fans.
Clear the toxic blockage.

stages.title: Report to Doc
stages.description: Doc can finally breathe long enough to pay you.

tasks.text: Return to Doc.

title: Heavy Lifting: Required Training
summary: Required Logistics certification: Boggs will not authorize Sector 4 until Nova proves she can break a shield.
description: Bring the loader online, clear Boggs' cargo, save the trapped workers, and complete the mandatory Guard Break drill before the Deep Elevator opens.
flavor: Boggs calls it labor efficiency. Nova calls it not letting people die under a crate.

stages.title: Required Logistics Certification
stages.description: Boggs folds Nova's shield certification into cargo cleanup. The Deep Elevator stays locked until the training log clears.

tasks.text: Report to Foreman Boggs for mandatory shield training.
Start the loader.
Move the collapsed cargo.

stages.title: Mandatory Guard Break Drill
stages.description: The loader route becomes a controlled lesson in breaking a shield before attacking.

tasks.text: Learn Hydraulic Kick.
Use Guard Break or Stagger against a shielded target.
Clear the final debris and free the trapped workers.

title: Protocol Override
summary: A hacked terminal in the Server Room still carries code from a resistance cell that failed.
description: Find the old rebel terminal, restore its protocol spoof, and leave with admin access that can shave time off future security work.
flavor: If you are reading this, we failed. But the code still works.

stages.title: Find the Terminal
stages.description: The Server Room hides old code Dominion never fully scrubbed.

tasks.text: Enter the Server Room.
Locate the hacked terminal.
Thaw the frozen console controls.
Restore the spoof and apply the rebel access override.

title: The Lost Shift
summary: A dead miner's datapad proves the colony stopped being employment long before Nova noticed.
description: Track the missing shift through the Deep Mine, recover the datapad, and learn what Dominion does when workers stop producing.
flavor: They were not paying us anymore. They were just keeping us.

stages.title: Trace the Missing Shift
stages.description: A collapsed side route holds the last record of a crew nobody rescued.

tasks.text: Find the collapsed tunnel in the Deep Mine.
Recover the dead miner's datapad.
Read the miner's final letter.

title: A Strange Coast
summary: The pod crashed in the overgrown ruins of Sector 9. Keep Zeke alive, recover the Chime, and find a safer route away from the wreck.
description: Check on Zeke, recover the Chime and emergency supplies from the pod, stabilize him, then follow the glow-water stream toward shelter.
flavor: The air smells of ozone and crushed green ferns. The metal hull is cold.

stages.title: Assess the Crash
stages.description: Find your bearings after the crash in Sector 9.

tasks.text: Talk to Zeke at the pod wreckage.
Examine the sub-critical pod core.
Use the emergency medkit to stabilize Zeke.
Follow the glow-water stream into the ruins.

title: The Signal
summary: A clean distress frequency cuts through the jungle static, pointing toward an ancient gate.
description: Push through the hostile canopy, find the Temple Gate, and use the recovered Chime to open the route into Sanctuary.
flavor: A clean frequency in a world of static.

stages.title: The Sanctuary Threshold
stages.description: Reach the massive Temple Gate blocking the path deeper into the ruins.

tasks.text: Clear the hostile paths through the canopy.
Locate the massive Temple Gate.
Slot the Chime into the Temple Gate's resonator.

title: Sleeping Giant
summary: Someone has been asleep inside Sanctuary for twenty years, and the facility will not wake him without the right chord.
description: Read the Hall of Echoes murals, locate Orion's stasis chamber, prove the pod safeties agree, and bring the tuner back into the world.
flavor: Twenty years of sleep, waiting for a chord that never came.

stages.title: Ancient Geometry
stages.description: Examine the shifting murals in the Hall of Echoes to unlock the facility route.

tasks.text: Examine the shifting light murals in the Hall of Echoes.
Locate Orion's stasis chamber.

stages.title: Awaken the Tuner
stages.description: Use the mural pattern, pod pressure, overview sockets, and coolant flow to stabilize the stasis rings.

tasks.text: Stabilize the stasis rings with the chamber clues.
Talk to the awakened Orion.

title: The Hunter
summary: A Dominion stalker is tracking the crew, but their orders are starting to fracture.
description: Travel to Canopy Ridge, force Gh0st into the open, survive the Source Beast ambush, and turn a hunter into an uneasy ally.
flavor: He has a code, but the armor wears the orders.

stages.title: Confrontation
stages.description: Travel to the high Canopy Ridge and deal with the stalker.

tasks.text: Travel to the wind-swept Canopy Ridge.
Confront the hunter waiting in the shadows.
Defeat the mutated Source Beast.

title: Liftoff
summary: The Astra is the only way off Sector 9, but Sanctuary's gate, dead power lines, and the orbital shield stand in the way.
description: Settle the Source Gate's four feeding systems, inspect the Astra, salvage power conduits, wake the bridge relic with the Chime, and launch toward the Spire.
flavor: A vessel of old songs, ready to fly again.

stages.title: Rebuild the Circuit
stages.description: Resolve the gate chord, gather pod parts, and bring the Astra back online.

tasks.text: Resolve the Source Gate's horn, cup, roots, and breakers.
Inspect the Astra's dark console.
Recover power conduits from the pod wreckage.
Reroute the Chime through the bridge relic.
Release the Astra from the launch cradle.

title: Botanist
summary: Zeke wants to scan 5 unique plants to make sense of the local environment.
description: Find and scan unique flora in Sector 9.
flavor: Cataloging the weeds to forget the bugs.

stages.title: Ecological Scan
stages.description: Find and scan unique plant specimens.

tasks.text: Scan the giant crystalline ferns in the canopy.
Scan the bioluminescent weeds near the stream.
Scan the moss clinging to the pod wreckage.
Scan the razor-vine spores in the path.
Scan the ancient roots in the stasis chamber.

title: Lost Patrol
summary: Trace a lost patrol through three distress signatures, recover its transceiver, and repair its Thermal Cutter.
description: Locate the logs of a lost squad in the Sector 9 ruins and turn their damaged cutter into a useful field tool.
flavor: Steel rusts faster than bones here.

stages.title: Broken Signals
stages.description: Triangulate the scattered patrol signatures.

tasks.text: Trace the beacon in the wilds thickets.
Decode the beacon in the patrol hollow.
Confirm the signal from the ridge perch.

stages.title: Dominion Downfall
stages.description: Follow the combined vector to the patrol cache.

tasks.text: Recover the encrypted transceiver and damaged Thermal Cutter.
Repair the Thermal Cutter at a tinkering station.

title: Tideglass Day
summary: Orion suggests collecting glowing tideglass skewers from the beach for a hot meal.
description: Visit Tideglass Beach and gather glowing tideglass skewers.
flavor: Sometimes a hot meal is the only shield you have left.

stages.title: A Breather by the Waves
stages.description: Gather tideglass skewers from the glowing shore.

tasks.text: Discover Tideglass Beach.
Scavenge tideglass herbs and clean meat.
Craft Source Resin from the gathered materials.

title: Ancient Echoes
summary: Retrieve three wing crystals and use their harmonics to align the stasis chamber murals.
description: Calibrate the light-murals to hear their full song.
flavor: The stones remember when the choir was whole.

stages.title: Scattered Chorus
stages.description: Recover resonance crystals from the Sanctuary wings.

tasks.text: Retrieve the western wing resonance crystal.
Retrieve the eastern wing resonance crystal.
Retrieve the acoustics lab resonance crystal.

stages.title: Chorus Tuning
stages.description: Seat the crystals and restore the stasis mural chord.

tasks.text: Seat the crystal voices and restore the mural chord.

title: Stolen Tech
summary: Infiltrate the guarded maintenance vents, hack their security grid, and recover the stolen transmitter.
description: Scavenge the maintenance vents for the transmitter.
flavor: It's not stealing if they're all dead.

stages.title: Silent Frequency
stages.description: Defeat the vent security without alerting the facility.

tasks.text: Hack the vent security grid.
Slip past the guard-system scan pattern.

stages.title: Ventilation Scramble
stages.description: Reach the tech alcove beyond the grid.

tasks.text: Recover the Dominion transmitter core.
Assemble the Rapid Capacitor from the transmitter core.

title: Homecoming
summary: Land beneath the Spire and follow Zeke back into the city that erased him.
description: Avoid Dominion surveillance by landing in the sewers, clear the landing zone, climb into the Lower City, and let Zeke turn his old apartment into a safehouse before the city notices he came home.
flavor: A homecoming is still a homecoming when the locks have forgotten your name.

stages.title: Securing the Sewers
stages.description: Clear the sewers of local security and set up a landing site.

tasks.text: Clear local hostile forces at the landing pad.
Follow the run-off tunnels up to the Vent Output.

stages.title: Zeke's Safehouse
stages.description: Reach Zeke's old apartment, let him face what Dominion deleted, and set up a shielded base before the city can hear the crew breathing.

tasks.text: Locate Zeke's apartment inside The Static block.
Let Orion shield Zeke's apartment from Dominion scans.

title: The Plan
summary: Case the Lower City, gather what the rich overlook, and turn survival scraps into an Upper City heist.
description: Use Jax's curfew schedules, Gh0st's security pull, Zeke's elevator blueprints, patrol timing, service gate badges, and safehouse disguise materials to build a plan that depends on the crew trusting each other under pressure.
flavor: A heist is just hope with a schedule.

stages.title: Intelligence Gathering
stages.description: Collect timing, credentials, route data, and disguise pieces from people and places the Upper City thinks are beneath notice.

tasks.text: Get curfew schedules from Jax at The Static.
Study patrol timing from the underrail map.
Pull security records from the plaza kiosk.
Copy freight badge patterns at the service gate.
Source disguise materials from the safehouse roof laundry lines.
Hack Spire elevator blueprints at Zeke's workstation.

stages.title: The Assembly
stages.description: Bring every intel thread back to the safehouse planning table and decide who risks being seen.

tasks.text: Use the planning table to assign roles, commit the crew, and launch the heist.

title: Neon Fix
summary: Help Jax repair his bar's flickering neon sign to keep Dominion security away.
description: Inspect the flickering sign at The Static and install a replacement neon sign core.
flavor: In the Lower City, darkness is a shield. Neon is just advertisement.

stages.title: Sign Repair
stages.description: Replace the neon sign's burnt core.

tasks.text: Inspect the flickering sign outside The Static.
Install the replacement neon sign core.

title: Cold Case
summary: Help Gh0st search Spire security databases for records on his sister Elara.
description: Examine terminal records in the Transit Plaza to find clues about Elara.
flavor: A name is just data, until it becomes a song you can't stop humming.

stages.title: Database Breach
stages.description: Search Dominion security databases in the plaza.

tasks.text: Search terminal records at Transit Plaza.

title: Night Market Run
summary: Help Mika repair the Night Market's string lanterns under patrol pressure.
description: Search the alleyways and fix the flickering lanterns to light up the market.
flavor: Light doesn't just show the way; it shows we are still here.

stages.title: Lighting the Market
stages.description: Fix the flickering market lanterns.

tasks.text: Fix the flickering lanterns in the Night Market.

title: Social Engineering
summary: Enter the Upper City and survive its politeness long enough to become invisible.
description: Move through Laundry Service, borrow the shape of workers the city refuses to see, pass the Staff Checkpoint, endure the Skypark's perfect contempt, blind scanner coverage, and send Nova and Gh0st through the service chute toward the Archive.
flavor: The cleanest room is where they wash the blood off the rules.

stages.title: Guest Access
stages.description: Create a believable path into the penthouse by letting the city mistake cruelty for order.

tasks.text: Survive the Skypark guest registry and acquire guest access.
Have Zeke and Orion blind the scanner grid from Laundry Service.

stages.title: Pass the Scanners
stages.description: Move Nova and Gh0st through the lobby while security is blind.

tasks.text: Use the service chute to pass into the Archive approach in disguise.

title: The Lens
summary: Reach the Archive, resolve the Prism Gallery containment field, and take the Lens even when it recognizes Nova first.
description: Enter the Archive, read the Prism Gallery's light machinery with Orion, and take the Lens knowing the relic will expose more than the crew planned to steal.
flavor: Truth is not a light. It is a wound that glows.

stages.title: Archive Infiltration
stages.description: Reach the vault and open the containment field.

tasks.text: Enter the Archive vault from the service route.
Resolve the Prism Gallery containment field.

stages.title: Claim the Relic
stages.description: Take the Lens, accept the cost of being seen, and survive the alarm.

tasks.text: Take the Lens relic after Zeke's warning and survive the alarm.

title: Burn Notice
summary: Escape the Upper City after Nova's signal turns the heist into a sector-wide hunt.
description: Fight through the lockdown, cross the drone test alcove, defeat the Administrator on the landing pad, and use the Lens to time the Astra through the Shield toward the Foundry before Vale's compliance net closes.
flavor: When paradise burns, the sprinklers dispense policy.

stages.title: Escape Lockdown
stages.description: Break out of the Archive after the plan collapses and fight to the roof before the city seals itself around the crew.

tasks.text: Cut through the drone test alcove and reach the landing pad under alarm.
Defeat the Administrator on the roof.
Use Scan to read the Shield gap.

stages.title: Slip the Shield
stages.description: Use the Lens to find the Shield gap and launch the Astra.

tasks.text: Launch the Astra toward the Foundry.

title: Corporate Espionage
summary: Steal an encrypted ledger from the Exec Lounge.
description: Lift a rival executive ledger from a private safe and turn their secrets into leverage.
flavor: The rich call it leverage when the poor call it theft.

stages.title: Private Safe
stages.description: Crack the lounge safe and take the ledger.

tasks.text: Steal the encrypted ledger from the Exec Lounge safe.

title: Prototype Testing
summary: Test a dangerous experimental weapon on Upper City drones.
description: Use a hacked lab terminal to run a weapon trial against Dominion drones and claim the Phase Rounds mod.
flavor: Quality assurance is easier when the product hates you back.

stages.title: Weapon Trial
stages.description: Run the prototype against drones in the Archive test alcove.

tasks.text: Test the experimental weapon on security drones.

title: Into the Fire
summary: Land in Sector 7 because the damaged Astra needs Foundry hardware to reach high orbit.
description: Secure the Obsidian Shelf, confirm the Astra cannot climb to the Orbital Ring as-is, cross the Slag River, and hack the cooling vents so the service airlock can open.
flavor: The Foundry does not guard its doors. It lets the heat do that.

stages.title: Obsidian Shelf
stages.description: Land the Astra and orient in the Foundry heat.

tasks.text: Secure the Astra on the Obsidian Shelf.
Navigate the Slag River hazard crossing.

stages.title: Cooling the Gate
stages.description: Hack the vent controls and enter the service airlock.

tasks.text: Hack the cooling vent controls at Waste Intake.
Cycle the Service Airlock.

title: Ghost in the Machine
summary: Recover Project Phantom records before pushing toward the engine line.
description: Access the Project Phantom terminal, discover the truth about Gh0st and Elara, and regroup at the Cooling Springs before breaking into the factory floor that is still building successors.
flavor: A weapon can learn the name it was denied.

stages.title: Project Phantom
stages.description: Find the records that explain Gh0st's origin.

tasks.text: Access the Project Phantom terminal.

stages.title: Breather
stages.description: Regroup at the Cooling Springs after the truth lands.

tasks.text: Regroup with Gh0st at the Cooling Springs.

title: Sabotage
summary: Destroy Dominion ammo crates staged around the Slag Pits.
description: Answer a worker-resistance mark by destroying three ammo crates that feed the guns above the Obsidian Shelf.
flavor: Every crate that does not fire at you later is a good crate.

stages.title: Resistance Marks
stages.description: Break the Foundry supply chain without waiting for permission.

tasks.text: Destroy the marked ammo crate at the Slag River.
Destroy the marked ammo crate at Waste Intake.
Destroy the marked ammo crate at the Service Airlock.

title: Lost Worker
summary: Find a missing engineer in the lava tube maintenance paths.
description: Follow a missing engineer's tablet to the Cooling Springs and recover the coolant rig she hid from Dominion before the Foundry consumed her.
flavor: In the Foundry, a missed check-in usually means the heat collected its debt.

stages.title: Last Ping
stages.description: Trace the engineer's final maintenance ping through the only quiet place in the Foundry.

tasks.text: Recover the missing engineer's hidden coolant rig.

title: The Scrap Heap
summary: Salvage parts from destroyed mechs in the lava-flow debris.
description: Help a scrapper drone strip useful parts from wrecked machines before the Foundry melts the evidence of its own failures.
flavor: The Foundry throws nothing away. It just waits for someone desperate enough to pick it up.

stages.title: Useful Failures
stages.description: Turn Dominion wreckage into survival tools before the intake eats it.

tasks.text: Salvage usable parts from the half-melted mech pile.

title: The Assembly
summary: Fight through the Foundry production floor and break the Phantom fabrication line blocking the engine route.
description: Navigate conveyor belts, survive Phantom Prototype waves, and overload the fabrication matrix feeding Gh0st's mass-production successors.
flavor: The machine of war sounds like work until it starts printing faces.

stages.title: Production Floor
stages.description: Cross the conveyor belts and survive the gauntlet.

tasks.text: Navigate the conveyor belts.
Defeat the Phantom Prototype wave.

stages.title: Overload
stages.description: Break the fabrication matrix.

tasks.text: Overload the fabrication matrix.

title: The Anvil
summary: Reach the Forge and steal the Anvil relic before Rylos seals the core.
description: Read the Forge machinery, open the Anvil cradle, and unlock Construct after Nova's first failed attempt to shape the Foundry's heat into a path.
flavor: Creation answers intent. Doubt becomes debris.

stages.title: Forge Access
stages.description: Open the Anvil cradle.

tasks.text: Reach the Forge core chamber.
Open the Anvil cradle.

stages.title: Claim the Relic
stages.description: Take the Anvil and learn what Construct costs.

tasks.text: Acquire the Anvil relic.

title: Meltdown
summary: Defeat Rylos, steal the Deep-Core Engine and Phase-Cutter Arrays, and make the Astra high-orbit capable.
description: Defeat Rylos without letting him define Gh0st, steal the Deep-Core Engine and Phase-Cutter Arrays Vale needs for the Ascension Cradle, then launch before the Foundry seals around the crew.
flavor: The Foundry built instruments for silence. You steal the noise.

stages.title: Rylos
stages.description: Confront Commander Rylos on the Titan Dock.

tasks.text: Confront Commander Rylos.
Defeat the Titan Walker.

stages.title: Steal the Heart
stages.description: Grab the engine, arrays, and escape before meltdown.

tasks.text: Steal the Deep-Core Engine.
Steal the Phase-Cutter Arrays.
Escape the Foundry aboard the Astra.

title: Quality Control
summary: Resolve the rejected defective units becoming sentient.
description: A rejected droid points you to five defective units that are waking up inside the quality-control queue. Reprogram them or shut them down cleanly.
flavor: The line calls it defect. Gh0st calls it a choice.

stages.title: Defective Units
stages.description: Choose what to do with the waking units.

tasks.text: Resolve the defective units in quality control.

title: Overclocked
summary: Survive three overclocked test chamber waves.
description: Survive an overclocked Forge hazard trial and prove Nova's new Construct discipline can hold under pressure.
flavor: The Foundry's safety protocol is a waiver it signs for you.

stages.title: Construct Trial
stages.description: Use the Foundry's own hazard program as practice before the Titan fight.

tasks.text: Survive three overclocked hazard waves.

title: Docking Procedure
summary: Use the stolen Foundry hardware to breach Vale's Orbital Ring lockdown.
description: Use the stolen Foundry hardware to break high orbit, survive Vale's fighter screen, force dock at the Executive Spire, and get inside before the Ring finishes erasing Thorne's command.
flavor: The Halo does not welcome visitors. It processes them.

stages.title: The Halo
stages.description: Reach the Ring through the Compliance screen.

tasks.text: Approach the Orbital Ring.
Shoot down the Compliance fighters.

stages.title: Forced Docking
stages.description: Take control of the Executive Dock.

tasks.text: Force dock on the Executive Spire.
Help Gh0st hack the airlock.

title: Zero G
summary: Cross the executive paradise and prove Harmony is a cage, not salvation.
description: Move through the Solarium's curated paradise, break the Security Hub, descend the zero-gravity service shaft, access the Server Farm, and find Thorne inside the system Vale stole from her.
flavor: Paradise above. A cage below. Silence everywhere.

stages.title: False Paradise
stages.description: Cross the executive decks and reach the core lift.

tasks.text: Cross the Solarium Deck.
Defeat the Security Hub patrol.

stages.title: Zero G
stages.description: Descend past the Hunter-Killer patrols.

tasks.text: Navigate the maintenance shaft.
Access the Server Farm mainframe.
Find Director Thorne.

title: Employee of the Month
summary: Read Thorne's private logs and expose the business logic behind Harmony.
description: Open Thorne's private archive to learn how Project Harmony moved from containment product to Vale's ascension doctrine.
flavor: Every empire keeps minutes.

stages.title: Private Archive
stages.description: Read the Director's logs.

tasks.text: Read the Director's personal logs.

title: Solar Maintenance
summary: Repair the false sun that keeps the executive paradise presentable.
description: Help the maintenance bot recover the Solarium mirror array from invasive void-moss and reveal how much labor it takes to maintain luxury in a sealed cage.
flavor: Even a false sun needs someone to clean it.

stages.title: Mirror Array
stages.description: Restore the Solarium mirror array.

tasks.text: Trace the false sun and burn the void-moss off the Solarium mirrors.

title: Vacuum Seal
summary: Seal the breach damage caused by the Astra's forced docking.
description: Use the Executive Dock pressure console to isolate the ruptured compartments before the Ring's luxury facade vents into space.
flavor: Space is patient. Seals are not.

stages.title: Pressure Loss
stages.description: Seal the damaged hull sections.

tasks.text: Map the dock pressure loss and seal the three hull breaches.

title: The Core Approach
summary: Follow Thorne's route through Vale's rewritten firewall and reach Elara.
description: Navigate the Server Farm, use Thorne's inside knowledge to break three firewall nodes Vale rewrote, and destroy the hard-light construct guarding the Anchor Chamber.
flavor: The cold is deliberate. So is the route.

stages.title: Firewall Route
stages.description: Find and disable the three firewall nodes.

tasks.text: Map the Server Farm route through Thorne's firewall nodes.
Hack Firewall Node Alpha.
Hack Firewall Node Beta.
Hack Firewall Node Gamma.

stages.title: Hard-Light Guardian
stages.description: Defeat the Firewall Construct.

tasks.text: Defeat the Firewall Construct.

title: The Anchor
summary: Find Elara, prove she is not infrastructure, and steal the Anchor.
description: Enter the Anchor Chamber, reunite Gh0st with Elara, break the logic treating her as a living processor, and take the Anchor before Vale rewrites the root system.
flavor: A person is not a key, a battery, or a weapon blueprint.

stages.title: The Living CPU
stages.description: Reach Elara inside the Anchor Chamber.

tasks.text: Enter the Anchor Chamber.
Find Elara wired into the Ring.

stages.title: The Anchor
stages.description: Take the relic and escape the chamber.

tasks.text: Acquire the Anchor relic.

title: Critical Mass
summary: Survive Vale's Soloist coup and escape the Ring as reality tears open.
description: Reach the Throne Room, see Vale turn Harmony into the Soloist, defeat the Compliance Avatar, and enter the Tear because Elara and the world are being pulled through it.
flavor: One voice is not peace. It is the end of everyone else.

stages.title: The Soloist
stages.description: Confront Vale in the Throne Room.

tasks.text: Reach the Throne Room.
Confront Vale and witness the Soloist.

stages.title: Critical Mass
stages.description: Break the Avatar and reach the Tear.

tasks.text: Defeat the Compliance Avatar.
Enter the Tear.

title: Ghost in the Shell
summary: Recover defensive code Vale ordered erased.
description: Extract the last intact defensive routines from a purged server rack and turn one of Vale's deletions into protection.
flavor: Deleted is not the same as gone.

stages.title: Purged Rack
stages.description: Recover the defensive backup.

tasks.text: Recover the purged backup data.

title: Admin Privileges
summary: Use dead privilege against the people who built it.
description: Recover the SysAdmin keycard in the Server Farm and carry it to the Throne Room armory before Vale's coup makes every old permission meaningless.
flavor: Privilege survives its owner.

stages.title: Administrator Key
stages.description: Find the executive armory credential.

tasks.text: Recover the SysAdmin keycard.

stages.title: Executive Armory
stages.description: Open the armory.

tasks.text: Unlock the executive armory.

title: Fractured Minds
summary: Rescue the crew from three nightmares and reassemble the Starborn.
description: Pull Zeke, Gh0st, and Orion out of the Source nightmares that expose what Vale would erase: shame, grief, memory, and every voice that makes them real.
flavor: Reality is subjective here. So is the way out.

stages.title: Three Nightmares
stages.description: Find each missing member of the crew.

tasks.text: Rescue Zeke from the Infinite Cubicle.
Rescue Gh0st from the Endless War.
Rescue Orion from the Silent Shore.

stages.title: The Key
stages.description: Return to the Campfire and reassemble the crew.

tasks.text: Reassemble the team at the Campfire.

title: The Echo of the Mines
summary: Cross the distorted beginning of Nova's journey.
description: Return to the first wound in Nova's life, reject Vale's polished replacement for the Colony, and find the elevator out of the loop.
flavor: The beginning remembers you differently.

stages.title: The Beginning
stages.description: Find a route through the distorted colony.

tasks.text: Enter the Echo of the Mines.
Avoid the Manager projections.
Reach the elevator.

title: The Crossing
summary: Build a bridge from memory and reach the final ascent.
description: Build a bridge from shared memories the Source cannot counterfeit, take one final breath with the crew, and cross into the Singularity together.
flavor: No one crosses alone.

stages.title: Bridge of Memories
stages.description: Build and cross the bridge.

tasks.text: Anchor the bridge with the crew's separate memories.
Share one final moment with the crew.
Reach the Singularity entrance.

title: Jed's Echo
summary: Speak with Jed's memory at his old workbench.
description: Return to the workbench where Nova learned what survival was supposed to protect.
flavor: A memory cannot answer, but it can remind.

stages.title: Old Workbench
stages.description: Talk to Jed's echo.

tasks.text: Talk to Jed's echo.

title: The HR Record
summary: Let Zeke delete the employee file that still defines him.
description: Find Zeke's Dominion record inside the Infinite Cubicle and erase its authority over him.
flavor: Employment status is not identity.

stages.title: Personnel File
stages.description: Delete Zeke's record.

tasks.text: Delete Zeke's employee file.

title: Elara's Song
summary: Recover a pure recording of Elara's voice.
description: Separate Elara's original song from the command layers built over Gh0st's memories.
flavor: Before she was a key, she was a voice.

stages.title: Clean Signal
stages.description: Recover Elara's song.

tasks.text: Recover the pure recording.

title: The Spire of Thought
summary: Climb the memory spiral and defeat the Source shadows guarding the Center.
description: Climb through the scars of every world, refuse Vale's revisions, survive the shadow wave, and break the memory defenses guarding the Center.
flavor: The universe keeps every version you almost became.

stages.title: Memory Stair
stages.description: Climb through fragments of the journey.

tasks.text: Reject Vale's revisions and climb the Memory Stair.
Defeat the Source Shadow wave.

stages.title: Spire of Thought
stages.description: Break the final memory defenses.

tasks.text: Defeat the Memory Leak and Nightmare Guard.
Reach the Center.

title: The Final Note
summary: Defeat the Ascended and tune the world.
description: Confront Vale's promise of painless silence, defeat both Ascended forms, and use the Key as a shared circuit instead of a throne.
flavor: Not fate. Not one voice. A choice made together.

stages.title: The Soloist
stages.description: Defeat Vale's human form.

tasks.text: Confront Vale at the Center.
Defeat the Ascended: Soloist.

stages.title: The Singularity
stages.description: Defeat the Ascended god-form.

tasks.text: Defeat the Ascended: Silence.

stages.title: Tune the World
stages.description: Use the Key and complete the circuit.

tasks.text: Use the Key.
Tune the World.

title: The Aethel Grave
summary: Find the first Architects' burial ground in the Source.
description: Help Orion identify the resonance where the first Aethel surrendered their bodies to the current.
flavor: A grave is also proof that someone was here.

stages.title: First Architects
stages.description: Find the Aethel burial ground.

tasks.text: Find the Aethel Grave.

title: The Final Scavenge
summary: Recover a piece of the Astra from an impossible future.
description: Recover a future Astra hull fragment from the Impossible Archive and turn a doomed timeline into one last act of protection.
flavor: Nothing is junk if it got you home.

stages.title: Future Wreckage
stages.description: Find the Astra fragment from a future the crew still has time to refuse.

tasks.text: Recover the future Astra hull fragment.
